SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class AgenticProcessOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.AgenticProcessOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AgenticProcessOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Closed-loop, derivative-free optimizer that drives a process simulation through the string-addressable ProcessAutomation.evaluate(Map, String, java.util.List) primitive.

This class is purpose-built for machine-learning and agentic workflows. Unlike the classic optimizer classes in neqsim.process.util.optimizer (which take a Function<double[], Double> over an opaque ProcessSystem), AgenticProcessOptimizer works entirely in terms of:

  • Stable string addresses — decision variables, the objective, and constraints are all named with dot-notation paths (or area-qualified paths for a ProcessModel). No Java object navigation is required, so an LLM agent can construct a problem purely from ProcessAutomation.getAdjustableParametersJson() output.
  • A never-throwing, schema-versioned JSON contract — every trial is one gated evaluate() call (apply setpoints → run to convergence → gate feasibility → read back objectives). A malformed candidate degrades a single trial instead of crashing the loop, and optimize() itself never throws.
  • A full, replayable trajectory — every evaluated point is logged with its setpoints, read-backs, raw objective, penalty, feasibility, and minimized score. This is the (state, action, reward) tape that offline reinforcement learning, surrogate-model fitting, and agent post-mortems consume.

Algorithm. A bounded Nelder–Mead simplex search with deterministic random seeding. A process flowsheet exposed through evaluate() is a noisy, feasibility-gated black box with no usable analytic gradient, so a derivative-free method is the appropriate choice. Hard constraints are folded into the scalar score as quadratic penalties, and any infeasible run (failed convergence or a failed unit) is pushed to the back of the ordering with a large additive penalty while still being logged.

ML / agentic readiness. Call getReadinessJson() for a machine-readable self-assessment of how this optimizer fits ML and agentic pipelines (deterministic seeding, never-throw guarantee, bounded action space, reward shaping, trajectory logging, JSON I/O).

Example. 

 ProcessAutomation auto = plant.getAutomation();
 AgenticProcessOptimizer opt = auto.newOptimizer();
 opt.addVariable("Separation::Oil Heater.outletTemperature", 45.0, 95.0, "C");
 opt.minimize("Compression::Export Compressor.power", "kW");
 opt.addConstraintLessOrEqual("Export Oil.RVP", 0.90, "bara", 1.0e4);
 opt.setSeed(42).setMaxEvaluations(80);
 AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult result = opt.optimize();
 String json = result.toJson();
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint
    Immutable descriptor of a hard inequality constraint.
    static enum 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType
    Comparison direction for a hard inequality constraint.
    static final class 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.DecisionVariable
    Immutable descriptor of a bounded decision variable.
    static final class 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult
    Outcome of an optimization run, including the best point and the full trajectory.
    static enum 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense
    Optimization sense for an address-based objective.
    static final class 
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial
    Record of one evaluated candidate point: the (state, action, reward) tuple consumed by ML and agentic post-processing.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final double
    ALPHA
    Nelder–Mead reflection coefficient.
    private final ProcessAutomation
    automation
    The automation facade that backs every trial.
    private AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial
    bestFeasible
    Best feasible trial found so far (or null if none feasible).
    private AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial
    bestOverall
    Best (lowest-score) trial found so far regardless of feasibility.
    private final List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint>
    constraints
    Hard inequality constraints folded into the score as penalties.
    private double
    convergenceTolerance
    Relative simplex-size tolerance used to declare convergence of the outer search.
    private static final List<String>
    EMPTY_READBACKS
    Empty read-back list reused by score(double[]).
    private static final Map<String,Double>
    EMPTY_SETPOINTS
    Empty setpoint map reused by score(double[]).
    private int
    evaluations
    Running evaluation counter.
    private static final double
    GAMMA
    Nelder–Mead expansion coefficient.
    private static final double
    INFEASIBLE_PENALTY
    Additive score penalty applied to any infeasible trial (failed run or failed unit).
    private int
    innerMaxIterations
    Inner convergence iteration cap passed to evaluate().
    private double
    innerTolerance
    Inner convergence tolerance passed to evaluate().
    private int
    maxEvaluations
    Approximate maximum number of evaluate() calls.
    private static final double
    MISSING_READBACK_PENALTY
    Additive score penalty applied when an objective or constraint read-back is unavailable.
    private String
    objectiveAddress
    Address of the objective read-back (mode A); null when a custom function is used.
    private Function<Map<String,Double>,Double>
    objectiveFunction
    Custom objective function (mode B): receives a map of address -> value (decision variables, constraint read-backs and watches) and returns a scalar cost to MINIMIZE.
    private AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense
    objectiveSense
    Sense applied to the objective read-back.
    private String
    objectiveUnit
    Unit for the objective read-back.
    private static final double
    RHO
    Nelder–Mead contraction coefficient.
    static final String
    SCHEMA_VERSION
    Stable schema version for JSON produced by this optimizer.
    private long
    seed
    Seed for the deterministic random number generator used for seeding the simplex.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization id.
    private static final double
    SIGMA
    Nelder–Mead shrink coefficient.
    private List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial>
    trajectory
    Recorded trajectory of every evaluated point.
    private final List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.DecisionVariable>
    variables
    Decision variables (degrees of freedom) in registration order.
    private final Map<String,String>
    watches
    Extra addresses (with units) read every trial and exposed to custom objective functions.

    Method
    Description
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    addConstraint(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType type, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a hard inequality constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    addConstraintGreaterOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a value >= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    addConstraintLessOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
    Adds a value <= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
    private static void
    addNumber(com.google.gson.JsonObject o, String key, double value)
    Adds a numeric property, writing JSON null for non-finite values.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    addVariable(String address, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
    Adds a bounded decision variable (degree of freedom).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    addWatch(String address, String unit)
    Registers an additional address to read every trial and expose to a custom objective function.
    private static double[]
    centroidExcludingWorst(double[][] simplex)
    Computes the centroid of all simplex vertices except the worst (last) one.
    private static void
    clamp(double[] x, double[] lo, double[] hi)
    Clamps each component of x to its bounds in place.
    private static double[]
    combine(double[] base, double[] other, double coeff)
    Returns base + coeff * (base - other) component-wise (reflection/contraction helper).
    List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint>
    getConstraints()
    Returns the registered constraints.
    Set<String>
    getReadbackAddresses()
    Returns the set of unique read-back addresses (objective, constraints and watches).
    String
    getReadinessJson()
    Returns a machine-readable self-assessment of this optimizer's fit for ML and agentic workflows.

    getVariableAddresses()
    Returns the variable addresses as a list, for diagnostics.
    List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.DecisionVariable>
    getVariables()
    Returns the registered decision variables.

    mapToJson(Map<String,Double> map)
    Serializes a string-to-double map to a JSON object, writing JSON null for non-finite values.

    maximize(String address, String unit)
    Sets an address-based objective to maximize.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer

    Runs the closed-loop optimization.

    Runs the optimization and returns the result as schema-versioned JSON.

    rating(String name, String level, String note)
    Builds a single capability rating JSON object.
    private Double
    readSafe(String address, String unit)
    Reads a variable, returning null instead of throwing on any failure.
    private void
    runNelderMead()
    Executes the bounded Nelder–Mead search.
    private double
    score(double[] x)
    Evaluates one candidate point: applies setpoints, runs the gated convergence step, reads back the objective and constraints, computes the minimized score, logs a AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial, and updates the best-feasible / best-overall trackers.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    setConvergenceTolerance(double convergenceTolerance)
    Sets the relative simplex-size tolerance used to declare convergence of the outer search.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    setInnerConvergence(int innerMaxIterations, double innerTolerance)
    Sets the inner convergence settings passed to every evaluate() call.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    setMaxEvaluations(int maxEvaluations)
    Sets the approximate maximum number of evaluate() calls (objective evaluations).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer

    Sets an address-based objective with an explicit sense.

    setObjectiveFunction(Function<Map<String,Double>,Double> objectiveFunction)
    Sets a custom objective function (ML reward shaping).
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    setSeed(long seed)
    Sets the seed for the deterministic random number generator used to seed the simplex.
    private static double
    simplexSize(double[][] simplex, double[] lo, double[] hi)
    Computes a relative measure of simplex size: the maximum per-dimension vertex spread divided by the per-dimension bound range, maximized over dimensions.
    private static void
    sortSimplex(double[][] simplex, double[] fvals)
    Sorts simplex vertices (and their scores) in ascending score order using a simple insertion sort, which is adequate for the small n + 1 vertex count.
    int
    useAdjustableParameters()
    Adds every bounded adjustable parameter reported by ProcessAutomation.getAdjustableParameters() as a decision variable.

      private String objectiveAddress

      private String objectiveUnit
      Unit for the objective read-back.

    • objectiveSense

      private AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense objectiveSense
      Sense applied to the objective read-back.

    • objectiveFunction

      private transient Function<Map<String,Double>,Double> objectiveFunction
      Custom objective function (mode B): receives a map of address -> value (decision variables, constraint read-backs and watches) and returns a scalar cost to MINIMIZE. When set, it overrides the address-based objective.

    • maxEvaluations

      private int maxEvaluations
      Approximate maximum number of evaluate() calls.

    • innerMaxIterations

      private int innerMaxIterations
      Inner convergence iteration cap passed to evaluate().

    • innerTolerance

      private double innerTolerance
      Inner convergence tolerance passed to evaluate().

    • convergenceTolerance

      private double convergenceTolerance
      Relative simplex-size tolerance used to declare convergence of the outer search.

    • seed

      private long seed
      Seed for the deterministic random number generator used for seeding the simplex.

    • evaluations

      private transient int evaluations
      Running evaluation counter.

      private transient AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial bestFeasible
      Best feasible trial found so far (or null if none feasible).

    • bestOverall

      private transient AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial bestOverall
      Best (lowest-score) trial found so far regardless of feasibility.

    • trajectory

      private transient List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial> trajectory
      Recorded trajectory of every evaluated point.

      Empty read-back list reused by score(double[]).

  • Constructor Details

    • AgenticProcessOptimizer

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer(ProcessAutomation automation)
      Creates an optimizer bound to an automation facade.
      Parameters:
      automation - the automation facade wrapping the process to optimize; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if automation is null

  • Method Details

    • addVariable

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer addVariable(String address, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
      Adds a bounded decision variable (degree of freedom).
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of a writable input variable
      lowerBound - inclusive lower bound, in unit
      upperBound - inclusive upper bound, in unit; must be strictly greater than lowerBound
      unit - unit applied when writing this variable, or null for the variable's default unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null/empty or upperBound <= lowerBound or either bound is non-finite

    • useAdjustableParameters

      public int useAdjustableParameters()
      Adds every bounded adjustable parameter reported by ProcessAutomation.getAdjustableParameters() as a decision variable. Parameters without both a finite lower and upper bound are skipped (an unbounded decision space cannot be searched by simplex). This is the one-call way for an agent to populate the action space.
      Returns:
      the number of decision variables added

    • minimize

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer minimize(String address, String unit)
      Sets an address-based objective to minimize.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the objective read-back
      unit - unit for the objective read-back, or null for the default unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null or empty

    • maximize

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer maximize(String address, String unit)
      Sets an address-based objective to maximize.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the objective read-back
      unit - unit for the objective read-back, or null for the default unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null or empty

    • setObjective

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setObjective(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense sense, String unit)
      Sets an address-based objective with an explicit sense.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the objective read-back
      sense - whether to minimize or maximize; must not be null
      unit - unit for the objective read-back, or null for the default unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null/empty or sense is null

    • setObjectiveFunction

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setObjectiveFunction(Function<Map<String,Double>,Double> objectiveFunction)
      Sets a custom objective function (ML reward shaping). The function receives a map of address -> value containing every decision variable (by address), every constraint read-back, and every watch read-back, and returns a scalar cost to minimize. When set, this overrides any address-based objective. Constraint penalties are still added on top of the returned cost.
      Parameters:
      objectiveFunction - the cost function to minimize; must not be null
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if objectiveFunction is null

    • addConstraintLessOrEqual

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer addConstraintLessOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
      Adds a value <= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the constrained read-back
      limit - upper limit, in unit
      unit - unit for the read-back, or null for the default unit
      penaltyWeight - non-negative weight multiplying the squared violation
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null/empty, limit is non-finite, or penaltyWeight is negative

    • addConstraintGreaterOrEqual

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer addConstraintGreaterOrEqual(String address, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
      Adds a value >= limit hard constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the constrained read-back
      limit - lower limit, in unit
      unit - unit for the read-back, or null for the default unit
      penaltyWeight - non-negative weight multiplying the squared violation
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null/empty, limit is non-finite, or penaltyWeight is negative

    • addConstraint

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer addConstraint(String address, AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType type, double limit, String unit, double penaltyWeight)
      Adds a hard inequality constraint folded into the score as a quadratic penalty.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address of the constrained read-back
      type - comparison direction; must not be null
      limit - the limit value, in unit
      unit - unit for the read-back, or null for the default unit
      penaltyWeight - non-negative weight multiplying the squared violation
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null/empty, type is null, limit is non-finite, or penaltyWeight is negative

    • addWatch

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer addWatch(String address, String unit)
      Registers an additional address to read every trial and expose to a custom objective function. Watches do not affect the score on their own; they are convenience inputs for setObjectiveFunction(Function) reward shaping.
      Parameters:
      address - dot-notation address to read each trial
      unit - unit for the read-back, or null for the default unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if address is null or empty

    • setMaxEvaluations

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setMaxEvaluations(int maxEvaluations)
      Sets the approximate maximum number of evaluate() calls (objective evaluations). The search may overrun this cap by at most one Nelder–Mead iteration.
      Parameters:
      maxEvaluations - the evaluation budget; must be at least 2
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxEvaluations < 2

    • setInnerConvergence

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setInnerConvergence(int innerMaxIterations, double innerTolerance)
      Sets the inner convergence settings passed to every evaluate() call.
      Parameters:
      innerMaxIterations - maximum outer iterations for the convergence run; must be at least 1
      innerTolerance - relative convergence tolerance; must be finite and positive
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if innerMaxIterations < 1 or innerTolerance is not finite and positive

    • setConvergenceTolerance

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setConvergenceTolerance(double convergenceTolerance)
      Sets the relative simplex-size tolerance used to declare convergence of the outer search.
      Parameters:
      convergenceTolerance - relative tolerance; must be finite and positive
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if convergenceTolerance is not finite and positive

    • setSeed

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer setSeed(long seed)
      Sets the seed for the deterministic random number generator used to seed the simplex. Equal seeds with equal problem definitions yield identical trajectories, which is essential for reproducible ML experiments.
      Parameters:
      seed - the random seed
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining

    • optimize

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult optimize()
      Runs the closed-loop optimization. This method never throws — any unexpected error is captured in the returned result's message and success flag.
      Returns:
      the optimization result, including the best point and the full trajectory

    • optimizeToJson

      public String optimizeToJson()
      Runs the optimization and returns the result as schema-versioned JSON. Never throws.
      Returns:
      JSON produced by AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult.toJson()

    • runNelderMead

      private void runNelderMead()
      Executes the bounded Nelder–Mead search. Mutates bestFeasible, bestOverall, trajectory and evaluations.

    • score

      private double score(double[] x)
      Evaluates one candidate point: applies setpoints, runs the gated convergence step, reads back the objective and constraints, computes the minimized score, logs a AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial, and updates the best-feasible / best-overall trackers. Never throws.
      Parameters:
      x - the candidate decision-variable vector (assumed already within bounds)
      Returns:
      the minimized scalar score for x

    • readSafe

      private Double readSafe(String address, String unit)
      Reads a variable, returning null instead of throwing on any failure.
      Parameters:
      address - the address to read
      unit - the unit, or null for the default
      Returns:
      the value, or null if the read failed or was non-finite

    • clamp

      private static void clamp(double[] x, double[] lo, double[] hi)
      Clamps each component of x to its bounds in place.
      Parameters:
      x - the vector to clamp
      lo - lower bounds
      hi - upper bounds

    • combine

      private static double[] combine(double[] base, double[] other, double coeff)
      Returns base + coeff * (base - other) component-wise (reflection/contraction helper).
      Parameters:
      base - the base vector (typically the centroid)
      other - the vector reflected/contracted relative to base
      coeff - the coefficient
      Returns:
      a new combined vector

    • sortSimplex

      private static void sortSimplex(double[][] simplex, double[] fvals)
      Sorts simplex vertices (and their scores) in ascending score order using a simple insertion sort, which is adequate for the small n + 1 vertex count.
      Parameters:
      simplex - the simplex vertices, mutated in place
      fvals - the matching scores, mutated in place

    • centroidExcludingWorst

      private static double[] centroidExcludingWorst(double[][] simplex)
      Computes the centroid of all simplex vertices except the worst (last) one.
      Parameters:
      simplex - the sorted simplex
      Returns:
      the centroid vector

    • simplexSize

      private static double simplexSize(double[][] simplex, double[] lo, double[] hi)
      Computes a relative measure of simplex size: the maximum per-dimension vertex spread divided by the per-dimension bound range, maximized over dimensions.
      Parameters:
      simplex - the simplex vertices
      lo - lower bounds
      hi - upper bounds
      Returns:
      the relative simplex size

    • getReadinessJson

      public String getReadinessJson()
      Returns a machine-readable self-assessment of this optimizer's fit for ML and agentic workflows. Each capability is rated "full", "partial" or "none" with a short rationale, so an agent or experiment harness can decide whether to use it.
      Returns:
      schema-versioned JSON describing ML/agentic readiness

    • rating

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject rating(String name, String level, String note)
      Builds a single capability rating JSON object.
      Parameters:
      name - the capability name
      level - the rating level ("full", "partial" or "none")
      note - a short rationale
      Returns:
      the rating JSON object

    • addNumber

      private static void addNumber(com.google.gson.JsonObject o, String key, double value)
      Adds a numeric property, writing JSON null for non-finite values.
      Parameters:
      o - the target object
      key - the property name
      value - the value

    • mapToJson

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject mapToJson(Map<String,Double> map)
      Serializes a string-to-double map to a JSON object, writing JSON null for non-finite values.
      Parameters:
      map - the map to serialize
      Returns:
      the JSON object

    • getReadbackAddresses

      public Set<String> getReadbackAddresses()
      Returns the set of unique read-back addresses (objective, constraints and watches). Useful for agents that want to pre-validate addresses with ProcessAutomation.validateAddress(String) before optimizing.
      Returns:
      an ordered set of read-back addresses

    • getVariables

      public List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.DecisionVariable> getVariables()
      Returns the registered decision variables.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of decision variables

    • getConstraints

      public List<AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint> getConstraints()
      Returns the registered constraints.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of constraints

    • getVariableAddresses

      public List<String> getVariableAddresses()
      Returns the variable addresses as a list, for diagnostics.
      Returns:
      the decision-variable addresses in registration order
